subcodes.first_line: Praise and glorification befit the chosen ones, from whom were made manifest the revelations of the Divine Will and the Purpose of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا سزاوار اولیا بوده و هست که ظهورات اراده الهی و مشیت رحمانی از ایشان ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
